subtitle: Ours begins by listening to and understanding yours.

blocks.text: Some things can only be learned by living them. Roberto Piana grew up inside a craft and inside a city, Milan, that his father Giancarlo lived and shaped into a precise way of making architecture, from 1970 onward.

blocks.alt: Roberto Piana and his father Giancarlo
blocks.text: Today Roberto leads the studio with the same measure with which he enters a home: listening, with perspective and vision, already knowing what to look for. Because in every space there is something not yet seen, and in every person a unique way of inhabiting it.
